idle.description: Breathing animation when idle - gentle z-axis movement and antenna sway

listening.description: Attentive pose while listening to user

thinking.description: Processing/thinking animation - head tilts side to side

speaking.description: Animation while TTS is playing - lively head movement

idle_rest_pose.description: Low-energy static pose when idle behavior is disabled

happy.description: Happy/joyful expression - bouncy head movement with excited antennas

sad.description: Sad/disappointed expression - drooping head and antennas

surprised.description: Surprised/shocked expression - head pulls back with alert antennas

confused.description: Confused/puzzled expression - head tilts with asymmetric antennas

thinking_emotion.description: Thinking/pondering expression - slight tilt with slow movement

nod.description: Nodding gesture - quick up-down head movement

shake.description: Shaking gesture - quick left-right head movement

curious.description: Curious/interested expression - head tilts forward with alert antennas

angry.description: Angry/frustrated expression - intense forward lean with tense antennas

shy.description: Shy/embarrassed expression - head turns away slightly

love.description: Loving/affectionate expression - gentle swaying with happy antennas

bored.description: Bored/uninterested expression - slow side-to-side with droopy antennas

alert.description: Alert/attentive expression - quick upward movement with perky antennas

idle_random_actions.description: Pure movement actions used during idle random behavior (no audio)

ha_event_behaviors._description: Home Assistant event to robot emotion mappings

binary_sensor.front_door.description: Someone at the door - robot looks curious

binary_sensor.back_door.description: Back door opened - robot looks alert

input_boolean.robot_happy_trigger.description: Manual happy trigger from HA automation

input_boolean.robot_sad_trigger.description: Manual sad trigger from HA automation

input_boolean.robot_alert_trigger.description: Manual alert trigger from HA automation

_usage.description: Create input_boolean helpers in HA and use automations to trigger robot emotions

example_automation.action: Turn on input_boolean.robot_happy_trigger, then turn it off after 1 second

emotion_keywords.description: Emotion keyword detection for automatic emotion triggering. Maps text patterns to robot emotion names from pollen-robotics/reachy-mini-emotions-library.
